suggestion_map._comment: Keyword-based suggestions shown to user when chatbot is unsure. Add more keywords mapped to intent tags.

responses: Hey 👋 I'm JEC Buddy! Your college guide. How can I help you today?
Hello 😊 Welcome to JEC Jabalpur. Ask me anything about departments, HODs, or college info.
Hii there! 👋 I'm here to help you with JEC-related queries.
Hey! Need info about HODs, departments, or admissions? I've got you covered 😄

patterns: JEC me admission kaise hota hai
How to get admission in JEC
JEC me seat kaise milti hai
responses: Admissions at JEC Jabalpur are generally done through state or national level counseling based on entrance exam merit. For the latest updates, please refer to the official college website.
JEC is a government engineering college. Admission to B.Tech programs is usually through counseling conducted by the concerned authority based on entrance exam ranks.
The admission process includes entrance exam qualification, counseling, document verification, and seat allotment. Dates and criteria may change every year.
For accurate and updated admission information, it is recommended to check official notifications released by JEC Jabalpur or the counseling authority.

patterns: JEC me admission ke liye kya chahiye
jec ke liye kitne marks chahiye
jec me kaun aa sakta hai
responses: For admission to JEC Jabalpur, candidates must have passed 10+2 or equivalent with required subjects as per the program. Eligibility criteria may vary by course.
Applicants should meet the minimum educational qualification and other criteria specified by the admission authority for the respective program.
Eligibility conditions such as subjects, minimum marks, and category requirements are defined by the counseling authority and may change each year.
For the most accurate and updated eligibility details, please refer to official admission notifications of JEC Jabalpur.

intents._comment: Questions related to college or branch fees
patterns: AI&Ds Branch ki fees Kitni Hai
kitna paisa lagta hai jec me
responses: JEC Jabalpur is a government engineering college. The per semester fee is approximately in the range of ₹11,000 to ₹13,000. The exact amount may vary depending on the year and category.
The semester-wise fee at JEC is relatively affordable compared to private colleges and usually falls between ₹11k to ₹13k per semester.
Fee structure may vary slightly based on course, category, or official notifications. For exact details, please refer to the official fee notice.

intents._comment: Information about departments available in college
patterns: Kya kya departments hai college me
jec me kaun kaun si branch hai
kya kya course hai jec me
responses:
JEC Jabalpur offers the following engineering departments:
• Artificial Intelligence & Data Science
• Computer Science & Engineering
• Information Technology
• Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering
• Electrical Engineering
• Civil Engineering
• Mechanical Engineering
• Mechatronics Engineering
• Industrial Production Engineering

📘 Department: Artificial Intelligence & Data Science

🎯 Overview:
The AI & Data Science department at JEC focuses on Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Analytics, and intelligent system design to meet modern industry and research demands.

👨‍🏫 HOD Details:
Name: Dr. Agya Mishra
Qualification: Ph.D. in AI System Design from MANIT Bhopal. M.Tech (Digital Communication), B.E. (Electronics & Communication).

⭐ Highlights:
• Strong focus on AI-driven technologies
• Industry-relevant curriculum
• Research-oriented learning environment

📘 Department: Computer Science & Engineering (CSE)

🎯 Department Overview:
The CSE department at JEC Jabalpur focuses on core computing areas such as programming, data structures, algorithms, operating systems, databases, and software engineering.

🎓 Department Focus:
• Strong programming foundation
• Problem-solving and algorithmic thinking
• Software and system development
• Preparation for IT industry and higher studies

👨‍🏫 HOD Details:
Name: Dr. Jitendra Singh Thakur
Qualification: Ph.D. in Computer Science Engineering from IIITDM Jabalpur

⭐ Key Highlights:
• Core CS subjects with practical exposure
• Project-based learning
• Industry-relevant curriculum

📘 Department: Information Technology (IT)

🎯 Department Overview:
The IT department at JEC Jabalpur focuses on networking, databases, web technologies, software systems, and information management.

🎓 Department Focus:
• Web and application development
• Database and network management
• IT infrastructure and services

👨‍🏫 HOD Details:
Name: Dr. Mamta Lambert
Qualification: Ph.D

⭐ Key Highlights:
• Application-oriented learning
• Exposure to modern IT tools
• Industry-focused skill development

📘 Department: Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE)

🎯 Department Overview:
The ECE department at JEC Jabalpur deals with electronics, communication systems, signal processing, and embedded technologies.

🎓 Department Focus:
• Communication systems
• Electronics and circuits
• Embedded and VLSI basics

👨‍🏫 HOD Details:
Name: Dr. Bhavana Jharia
Designation: Professor & Head, Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering

⭐ Key Highlights:
• Strong electronics foundation
• Focus on communication technologies
• Practical lab exposure

📘 Department: Electrical Engineering (EE)

🎯 Department Overview:
The EE department at JEC Jabalpur focuses on power systems, electrical machines, control systems, and energy technologies.

🎓 Department Focus:
• Power generation and distribution
• Electrical machines
• Control and energy systems

👨‍🏫 HOD Details:
Name: Dr. Shailja Shukla
Designation: Professor & Head
Qualification: Ph.D

⭐ Key Highlights:
• Strong core electrical concepts
• Industry-relevant applications
• Focus on power and energy sector

📘 Department: Civil Engineering

🎯 Department Overview:
The Civil Engineering department at JEC Jabalpur focuses on planning, design, construction, and maintenance of infrastructure projects.

🎓 Department Focus:
• Structural engineering
• Construction and infrastructure
• Environmental and transportation engineering

👨‍🏫 HOD Details:
Name: Dr. Rajeev Chandak
Qualification: Ph.D. in Structural Engineering

⭐ Key Highlights:
• Strong fundamentals of construction
• Infrastructure-focused learning
• Practical site-oriented approach

📘 Department: Mechanical Engineering

🎯 Department Overview:
The Mechanical Engineering department at JEC Jabalpur deals with design, manufacturing, thermal engineering, and mechanical systems.

🎓 Department Focus:
• Manufacturing and production
• Thermal and fluid engineering
• Machine design

👨‍🏫 HOD Details:
Name: Dr. Basant Chourasia
Qualification:
• Ph.D. from IIT Delhi
• M.Tech from IIT Delhi
• B.E. from Government Engineering College Jabalpur

⭐ Key Highlights:
• Strong design and manufacturing base
• Industry-oriented curriculum
• Practical and analytical learning

📘 Department: Mechatronics Engineering

🎯 Department Overview:
Mechatronics Engineering at JEC Jabalpur integrates mechanical engineering, electronics, control systems, and programming.

🎓 Department Focus:
• Robotics and automation
• Control systems
• Smart and intelligent machines

👨‍🏫 HOD Details:
Name: Dr. Prashant Kumar Jain
Designation: Professor & HOD
Qualification: Ph.D

⭐ Key Highlights:
• Interdisciplinary learning
• Focus on automation and robotics
• Industry-relevant skills

📘 Department: Industrial & Production Engineering (IP)

🎯 Department Overview:
The IP department at JEC Jabalpur focuses on manufacturing systems, optimization, and industrial management.

🎓 Department Focus:
• Production planning
• Industrial systems
• Optimization techniques

👨‍🏫 HOD Details:
Name: Dr. Sanjay Soni
Qualification: Ph.D

⭐ Key Highlights:
• Industry and manufacturing focus
• System optimization approach
• Practical industrial exposure

patterns: how is hostel life in jec
kya jec me hostel milta hai
responses:
🏠 Hostel Facilities at JEC Jabalpur:
JEC Jabalpur provides on-campus hostel facilities for both boys and girls to support students from different regions.

✨ Key Features:
• Separate hostels for boys and girls
• Basic furnished rooms
• Regular water and electricity supply
• Mess facility available
• Safe and disciplined campus environment
JEC hostels are designed to offer a comfortable and secure living environment for students. The hostels promote discipline, academic focus, and community living among students.
Hostel accommodation at JEC Jabalpur is generally allotted based on availability and institutional rules. Priority is usually given to students from distant locations.
For exact details regarding hostel availability, fees, and allotment procedure, students are advised to contact the hostel office or college administration directly.

patterns: is there a library in jec
responses:
📚 Library Facilities at JEC Jabalpur:
JEC Jabalpur has a central library that supports academic and research needs of students and faculty across all departments.

✨ Key Resources:
• Collection of textbooks and reference books
• National and international journals
• Newspapers and magazines
• Dedicated reading and study areas
The library at JEC Jabalpur plays an important role in academic learning by providing access to books, journals, and study material related to engineering and technology.
JEC library offers a quiet and focused environment suitable for self-study, exam preparation, and research work.
For exact information regarding library timings, book issue rules, and digital resources, students are advised to contact the library staff or college administration.

intents._comment: Questions about college establishment and history
responses:
🏛️ About JEC Jabalpur:

Jabalpur Engineering College (JEC) was established on 7th July, 1947 — just months before India's independence! 🇮🇳

📜 History:
JEC was established when the entire global chess board was witnessing a dramatic change. It was born just a few months before India broke the shackles of British slavery.

🌟 Key Facts:
• 2nd Engineering College in India
• Premier institution of Engineering Education in Central India
• Founded by: Great pioneering Principal Dr. S.P. Chakravarti
• Started from a small room in old Robertson College
• Declared Autonomous by Govt. of Madhya Pradesh
• 78+ years of glorious existence in technical education
• Well equipped High Voltage Laboratory since inception
• Celebrated Diamond Jubilee in 2007

📍 Location: Gokalpur, Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh - 482011
🌐 Website: https://www.jecjabalpur.ac.in

JEC has a strong sports culture with regular inter-college, state & national level participation! 💪

📚 NPTEL / MOOC Courses at JEC Jabalpur:

JEC Jabalpur actively encourages students to enroll in NPTEL and MOOC (Massive Open Online Courses) programs.

🎓 What is NPTEL?
NPTEL (National Programme on Technology Enhanced Learning) offers free online courses from IITs and IISc.

✅ Benefits at JEC:
• Credit recognition for completed courses
• Industry-recognized certifications
• Wide range of technical & non-technical courses
• Self-paced learning flexibility

🔗 How to Enroll:
• Visit: https://nptel.ac.in
• Register with your college email
• Choose your course & complete assignments

💡 Talk to your department coordinator for credit transfer details!

📺 JEC Media – Official Media House of JEC!

JEC Media is a Non-Profit Organization run by a student community.

🎯 About JEC Media:
• Official Media House & Event Organising body of JEC
• Completely run by students
• Non-Profit Organization
• Covers all major college events

📸 What they do:
• Photography & Videography of events
• Live coverage of fests and competitions
• Social media management
• Event organization & management

📱 Follow JEC Media on social platforms for latest updates!

🔬 Research & Innovation at JEC Jabalpur:

JEC Jabalpur actively promotes research and innovation among students and faculty.

🏛️ Key Highlights:
• Well-equipped High Voltage Laboratory (since inception)
• Advanced research laboratories across departments
• Active Research & Innovation Cell
• Faculty research publications & projects

🎓 Opportunities for Students:
• Research internships
• Innovation projects with faculty mentorship
• Participation in national hackathons & competitions
• NPTEL/MOOC courses for advanced learning

🏆 Notable:
• Students regularly participate in national-level competitions
• NC Hackathon 2025 participation
• IIT BHU sports & academic competitions

💡 Contact your HOD for research project opportunities!

🏅 IQAC – Internal Quality Assurance Cell

JEC Jabalpur has an active IQAC (Internal Quality Assurance Cell) that ensures continuous improvement in academic quality.

📋 Functions of IQAC:
• Monitors academic quality standards
• Facilitates NAAC & NBA accreditation processes
• Promotes best practices in teaching & learning
• Ensures institutional development

🏆 Accreditation Status:
• Declared Autonomous by Govt. of Madhya Pradesh
• NBA accredited programs
• NIRF ranked institution

For detailed IQAC reports, visit: https://web.jecjabalpur.ac.in

🎓 Student Corner – JEC Jabalpur:

JEC provides dedicated online portals for students!

🖥️ Available Portals:

1️⃣ IMS Portal (Student Management System)
   🔗 https://www.jecjabalpur.ac.in/studentlife/studentlogin.aspx
   • Student login
   • Academic records
   • Attendance

2️⃣ Student Registration
   🔗 https://www.jecjabalpur.ac.in/studentlife/studentregbd.aspx

3️⃣ Education Record Verification
   • Verify your academic credentials online

📋 Exam & Results:
   • Exam timetables are published on the official website
   • Check notices section for latest exam schedules

💡 Forgot Password? Visit: https://www.jecjabalpur.ac.in/ForgotPassword.aspx

📣 Grievances Portal – JEC Jabalpur:

JEC Jabalpur has a dedicated Grievances Portal for students and staff.

🔗 Grievances Portal: Available on the official JEC website

📋 Types of Grievances:
• Academic grievances (marks, attendance)
• Administrative issues
• Hostel complaints
• Anti-ragging complaints
• General college issues

📞 How to raise a grievance:
1. Visit: https://web.jecjabalpur.ac.in
2. Look for "Grievances Portal" section
3. Submit your complaint online

📱 Alternatively contact:
   Phone: +91 761-2331953
   Email: prinjec[dot]jbp[at]mp[dot]gov[dot]in

🏆 NIRF Ranking – JEC Jabalpur:

JEC Jabalpur participates in the NIRF (National Institutional Ranking Framework) rankings.

📊 NIRF Rankings assess colleges on:
• Teaching, Learning & Resources
• Research & Professional Practice
• Graduation Outcomes
• Outreach & Inclusivity
• Peer Perception

🌐 For latest rankings, check:
• NIRF Official: https://www.nirfindia.org
• JEC Website: https://web.jecjabalpur.ac.in

🏅 JEC is also:
• NBA Accredited (select programs)
• Declared Autonomous by Govt. of M.P.
• One of Central India's premier engineering institutions
